item.title: The Book News We Covered This Week
item.description: New celebrity book clubs launching this year, the most read books on Goodreads, plus news from the world of SF/F, libraries, YA, and more.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 8, 2026
item.description: Bestselling nonfiction set in Savannah, GA, a bookish mystery-within-a-mystery, AN AMERICAN MARRIAGE, and more of the best ebook of the day.

item.title: The Biggest Book News of the Week
item.description: The 2003 bestseller getting the sequel treatment, the first full trailer for THE DEVIL WEARS PRADA 2, and more of this week's biggest news.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 7, 2026
item.description: An adapted Sally Rooney bestseller, award-winning Asia-inspired fantasy, Zadie Smith, an Irish American family saga, and more of the best deals of the...

item.title: Why Everyone is Talking About Bookshop.org
item.description: The Bookshop.org partnerships giving readers more ways to support indies, a farewell to the mass market paperback, and more.
